component.name: LocalVocal
component.summary: Local real-time speech transcription and translation for OBS

description.p: LocalVocal is an OBS Studio plugin providing real-time AI-powered speech-to-text transcription and translation. It runs entirely on your local machine — no cloud services, no API keys, and no data ever leaves your computer.

ul.li: Real-time transcription of audio to text in over 100 languages using OpenAI Whisper
Local neural machine translation powered by CTranslate2
On-screen caption display via OBS text sources
Export captions to SRT/TXT files or embed as WebVTT in a stream
Voice Activity Detection (VAD) to reduce false transcriptions
Support for custom and fine-tuned Whisper models in GGML format
GPU acceleration on NVIDIA (CUDA), AMD (ROCm) and Apple Silicon (Metal)

description.p: Experimental release with per-macOS-version Metal builds to fix crashes on older macOS releases.

screenshot.caption: LocalVocal settings panel in OBS Studio
